# Spindropmethod

**Summary**: A method used to measure the interfacial tension between two immiscible fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] used spinning drop IFT to evaluate the dynamics of IFT phenomena in CEOR.

## Key Results and Findings

- The dynamic IFT was evaluated utilizing Taylor's deformation theory... results were compared with those obtained from the spinning drop method, showing 97% accuracy for 1.25% VES. ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023, p. 26]])
